titles.title: You Are My All in All

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are my strength when I am weak You are the treasure that I seek You are my all in all Seeking You as a precious jewel Lord to give up I'd be a fool You are my all in all

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus Lamb of God worthy is Your name Jesus Lamb of God worthy is Your name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Taking my sin my cross my shame Rising again I bless your name You are my all in all When I fall down you pick me up When I am dry You fill my cup You are my all in all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus Lamb of God worthy is Your name Jesus Lamb of God worthy is Your name Jesus Lamb of God worthy is Your name Jesus Lamb of God worthy is Your name

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus Lamb of God worthy is Your name Jesus Lamb of God worthy is Your name Worthy is Your name Worthy is Your name
